legs.name: create_outcome_request
legs.detail: Buyer escrows the 300 wCOSMO max price against the frozen, hash-pinned patch request (r5) — pinned commit, allowed files, deadline, acceptance test included.

legs.name: submit_quote
legs.detail: Production-signed quote at 285 wCOSMO for the bonded provider.

legs.name: accept_quote
legs.detail: Job 2 minted; the 15 wCOSMO residual returns to the buyer and pre-funds the dispute reserve; the provider's 100 wCOSMO bond is on the hook.

legs.name: deliver_result
legs.detail: Signed, job-bound delivery anchored on-chain: sha3-256 of the delivery file, which in turn pins the patch bytes via its diff hash.

legs.name: approve_delivery
legs.detail: Approval was gated by the ten-criteria machine check returning ACCEPT; settlement pays the provider from escrow (settle path 0).
